# NSU Degree Audit — Copilot Agent Configuration

## Available Agents

### 🤖 NSU Audit Engineer
**File:** `nsu-audit-engineer.md`

A fully autonomous agent that handles all aspects of this project:
- ✅ Backend Python/Flask development
- ✅ Flutter mobile app development  
- ✅ Web frontend (HTML/CSS/JS)
- ✅ CLI application
- ✅ OCR integration
- ✅ CGPA & degree audit logic

**Key Feature:** Never asks questions — makes best decisions autonomously.

---

## How to Use

### In GitHub Copilot CLI (Opus 4.5)

1. Open the project in terminal
2. Start Copilot CLI
3. Reference the agent context:
   ```
   @nsu-audit-engineer Add a new GPA prediction feature
   ```

### In Autopilot Preview

The agent instructions are automatically picked up from this directory.

---

## Agent Behavior

| Aspect | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| Questions | Never asks — decides autonomously |
| Code style | Follows existing patterns |
| Cross-platform | Updates all clients when needed |
| Testing | Runs existing tests after changes |
| Commits | Creates clear, descriptive messages |

---

## Customization

Edit `nsu-audit-engineer.md` to:
- Add new decision defaults
- Update project knowledge
- Modify tech stack info
- Add new common tasks
